message:
test(ondisk): add adversarial dir block fuzzing and fix proptest assertion references

Expand adversarial corpus tests with proptest-driven directory block fuzzing
and synthetic dir block generation:

- Add synth_valid_dir_block helper that constructs valid dir blocks with
  configurable entries and optional checksum tail
- Add proptest for adversarial dir block iteration: generates blocks with
  random entry counts, inode numbers, file types, and names, verifying
  that iter_dir_block never panics and respects block boundaries
- Add minimal_valid_ext4_superblock_bytes helper to share raw byte construction

Also fix two proptest assertion calls to use reference comparisons
(prop_assert_eq!(&a, &b)) for types where owned comparison was ambiguous.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
